onboarding.videoSubtitle:
Real tower locations in 200+ countries
Confidence-rated from real measurements
onboarding.databaseBody: Carrier coverage maps are guesswork — painted to look good, not to be accurate. Ours cross-references real tower registrations, confidence-rated and refreshed every few days.
onboarding.antennaBody: Get the exact compass bearing to any tower. No guessing, no wasted install. Essential for signal boosters, rooftop antennas, and rural setups.
onboarding.terrainTitle: Hills block signal. We know that
onboarding.terrainBody: Most apps ignore elevation. Ours accounts for every hill and valley between you and the tower — so you see where signal actually reaches, not just the distance.
onboarding.locationBody: Required to find towers near you and calculate distances. Your location is never stored or shared.

list.title: Towers
list.emptyHint: Open the Map tab and pan to an area

tower.confidenceBody:
Based on the number of independent measurements for this tower.

• High — 10+ measurements
• Medium — 3–9 measurements
• Low — 1–2 measurements

More measurements from different devices mean a more accurate location.
tower.thanksBody: Your report helps improve tower accuracy for everyone.
